title: Twilio Message
description: Represents an SMS or MMS message sent or received through the Twilio Messaging API, including delivery status, pricing, and metadata.

sid.description: Unique 34-character identifier for the message (SM for SMS, MM for MMS)

account_sid.description: SID of the Twilio account that created the message

messaging_service_sid.description: SID of the messaging service used to send the message

to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format

from.description: Sender phone number, short code, or alphanumeric sender ID

body.description: Text content of the message (up to 1600 characters)

status.description: Current delivery status of the message

direction.description: Direction of the message relative to your Twilio account

num_segments.description: Number of segments the message body was split into

num_media.description: Number of media files associated with the message

price.description: Price of the message in the account currency

price_unit.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the price

error_code.description: Twilio error code if the message failed

date_created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message resource was created

date_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was last updated

date_sent.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was sent

api_version.description: Twilio API version used to process the message

uri.description: Relative URI for this message resource
